set(VPX_SRC_ROOT ${ANDROID_QEMU2_TOP_DIR}/../libvpx)
set(vpx_src

    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/avg_pred_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/fwd_txfm_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/highbd_idct16x16_add_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/highbd_idct32x32_add_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/highbd_idct4x4_add_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/highbd_idct8x8_add_sse2.c

    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/highbd_loopfilter_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/highbd_quantize_intrin_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/highbd_variance_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/inv_txfm_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/inv_txfm_ssse3.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/loopfilter_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/quantize_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/quantize_ssse3.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/sum_squares_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/variance_sse2.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_asm_stubs.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_subpixel_8t_intrin_ssse3.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_mem/vpx_mem.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_scale/generic/gen_scalers.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_scale/generic/vpx_scale.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_scale/generic/yv12config.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_scale/generic/yv12extend.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_scale/vpx_scale_rtcd.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_util/vpx_thread.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_util/vpx_write_yuv_frame.c
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/config/x86_64/vpx_config.c)
set(vpx_x86_64_asm_srcs
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/copy_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/copy_sse3.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/dequantize_mmx.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/idctllm_mmx.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/idctllm_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/iwalsh_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/loopfilter_block_sse2_x86_64.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/loopfilter_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/mfqe_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/recon_mmx.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/recon_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/subpixel_mmx.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/subpixel_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/common/x86/subpixel_ssse3.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/encoder/x86/dct_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/encoder/x86/encodeopt.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp8/encoder/x86/fwalsh_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp9/encoder/x86/vp9_dct_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp9/encoder/x86/vp9_error_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vp9/encoder/x86/vp9_quantize_ssse3_x86_64.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/add_noise_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/avg_ssse3_x86_64.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/deblock_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/fwd_txfm_ssse3_x86_64.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/highbd_intrapred_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/highbd_sad4d_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/highbd_sad_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/highbd_subpel_variance_impl_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/highbd_variance_impl_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/intrapred_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/intrapred_ssse3.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/inv_wht_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/sad4d_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/sad_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/sad_sse3.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/sad_ssse3.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/ssim_opt_x86_64.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/subpel_variance_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/subtract_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_convolve_copy_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_high_subpixel_8t_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_high_subpixel_bilinear_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_subpixel_8t_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_subpixel_8t_ssse3.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_subpixel_bilinear_sse2.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_subpixel_bilinear_ssse3.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_ports/emms.asm
    ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx/vpx_ports/x86_abi_support.asm)

android_yasm_compile(TARGET
                     vpx_asm
                     INCLUDES
                     ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx
                     ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/config/x86_64
                     SOURCES
                     ${vpx_x86_64_asm_srcs})
android_add_library(vpx)
target_compile_options(vpx
                       PRIVATE -arch x86_64
                               -Wall
                               -Wdeclaration-after-statement
                               -Wdisabled-optimization
                               -Wfloat-conversion
                               -Wparentheses-equality
                               -Wpointer-arith
                               -Wtype-limits
                               -Wcast-qual
                               -Wvla
                               -Wimplicit-function-declaration
                               -Wuninitialized
                               -Wunused
                               -Wextra
                               -Wundef
                               -Wframe-larger-than=52000
                               -Wshorten-64-to-32)
target_include_directories(vpx PRIVATE ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/config/x86_64 ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/config/generic)
target_include_directories(vpx PUBLIC ${VPX_SRC_ROOT}/libvpx)
target_link_libraries(vpx PRIVATE vpx_asm)
